title: ficus globosa var. manok
intro: Ficus globosa var. manok, also known as the Manok Ficus, is a plant species native to the Philippines, belonging to the Moraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ficus globosa var. manok include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, and is often used in traditional Filipino medicine to promote overall well-being.
